     2→import { searchWith, waitForResults, getResultCount } from './helpers'

     4→test.describe('Ranking Blend', () => {
     5→  test('adjust one ranking blend slider reorders results by blend score @critical @blend', async ({
     6→    page,
     7→  }) => {
     8→    await searchWith(page, {})
     9→    await waitForResults(page)
    10→
    11→    // Capture the first result name before blend
    12→    const firstResultBefore = await page
    13→      .locator('[class*="Card"], [data-testid="results-list"] >> text=/\\w/')
    14→      .first()
    15→      .textContent()
    16→
    17→    // Open the ranking blend builder and adjust the US News National slider
    18→    const blendBuilder = page.getByTestId('ranking-blend-builder')
    19→    await expect(blendBuilder).toBeVisible()
    20→
    21→    const usNewsSlider = blendBuilder
    22→      .locator('[data-field="rank_us_news_national"]')
    23→      .getByRole('slider')
    24→    await usNewsSlider.fill('50')
    25→
    26→    // Wait for results to update after blend change
    27→    await waitForResults(page)
    28→
    29→    // The URL should now contain the blend parameter
    30→    await expect(page).toHaveURL(/blend=rank_us_news_national:50/)
    31→
    32→    // Verify blendScore is being used — the result order should potentially change
    33→    // (we verify the blend param is applied; exact reordering depends on data)
    34→    const resultCount = await getResultCount(page)
    35→    expect(resultCount).toBeGreaterThan(0)
    36→  })
    37→
    38→  test('reset blend returns to default sorting @standard @blend', async ({ page }) => {
    39→    // Navigate with an active blend
    40→    await searchWith(page, { blend: 'rank_us_news_national:50,rank_forbes:30' })
    41→    await waitForResults(page)
    42→
    43→    // Verify blend is active in URL
    44→    await expect(page).toHaveURL(/blend=/)
    45→
    46→    // The Reset button should be visible when blend weights are set
    47→    const blendBuilder = page.getByTestId('ranking-blend-builder')

    49→    await expect(resetButton).toBeVisible()
    50→
    51→    // Click reset

    53→
    54→    // Wait for results to update

    63→

1→import { type Page, expect } from '@playwright/test'
     2→
     3→/**
     4→ * Shared E2E test utilities for Kapow.
     5→ *
     6→ * Tagging convention for test titles:
     7→ *
     8→ *   Tiers (pick one):
     9→ *     @critical        — must-pass smoke tests; blocks deployment
    10→ *     @standard        — normal regression coverage
    11→ *     @comprehensive   — edge cases, visual, slow scenarios
    12→ *
    13→ *   Features (pick one or more):
    14→ *     @search    @filters    @pagination   @sorting
    15→ *     @views     @detail     @columns      @geo
    16→ *     @blend     @export     @auth         @nav
    17→ *     @responsive
    18→ *
    19→ *   Example test title:
    20→ *     'loads search page and displays results @critical @search'
    21→ */
    22→
    23→/**
    24→ * Navigate to the /search page with the given URL search params.
    25→ *
    26→ * @example
    27→ *   await searchWith(page, { q: 'MIT', state: 'MA' })
    28→ *   // navigates to /search?q=MIT&state=MA
    29→ */
    30→export async function searchWith(
    31→  page: Page,
    32→  params: Record<string, string>,
    33→): Promise<void> {
    34→  const search = new URLSearchParams(params).toString()
    35→  const url = search ? `/search?${search}` : '/search'
    36→  await page.goto(url)
    37→}
    38→
    39→/**
    40→ * Wait for the search results skeleton to clear and results to become visible.
    41→ * Asserts that the loading indicator disappears and at least one result or
    42→ * the "institutions found" / "results" text is visible.
    43→ */
    44→export async function waitForResults(page: Page): Promise<void> {
    45→  // Wait for the loading skeleton to disappear
    46→  await expect(page.getByTestId('results-loading')).toBeHidden({
    47→    timeout: 30_000,
    48→  })
    49→
    50→  // Wait for the results summary text to appear
    51→  // Matches both "Showing 1-20 of 42 institutions found" and "100+ results"
    52→  await expect(
    53→    page.getByText(/institutions found|results/i),
    54→  ).toBeVisible({ timeout: 10_000 })
    55→}
    56→
    57→/**
    58→ * Parse the displayed result count from the results summary text.
    59→ * Handles both "Showing X-Y of Z institutions found" and "100+ results" formats.
    60→ *
    61→ * @returns The total number of results, or 101 for the "100+" display.
    62→ */
    63→export async function getResultCount(page: Page): Promise<number> {
    64→  const summaryLocator = page.getByText(/Showing \d+/i)
    65→  const text = await summaryLocator.textContent()
    66→
    67→  if (!text) {
    68→    throw new Error('Could not find results summary text on page')
    69→  }
    70→
    71→  // Match "100+ results" format
    72→  const plusMatch = text.match(/(\d+)\+\s*results/i)
    73→  if (plusMatch) {
    74→    return Number(plusMatch[1]) + 1
    75→  }
    76→
    77→  // Match "Showing X-Y of Z institutions found" or "Showing X-Y of Z,ZZZ institutions found"
    78→  const ofMatch = text.match(/of\s+([\d,]+)/i)
    79→  if (ofMatch) {
    80→    return Number(ofMatch[1].replace(/,/g, ''))
    81→  }
    82→
    83→  throw new Error(`Could not parse result count from text: "${text}"`)
    84→}
    85→

Base directory for this skill: /home/ketan/project/kapow/.claude/skills/swarm-project

# Swarm Project: Kapow

Delegates to the global `/swarm` workflow with Kapow-specific configuration
injected. Run `/swarm-project` exactly as you would `/swarm`.

## Usage

- `/swarm-project` — work all `bd ready` issues
- `/swarm-project 3` — max 3 concurrent teammates
- `/swarm-project 3 id-abc id-def` — specific issues, max 3 concurrent

## Instructions

Run the global `/swarm` skill, but override Phase 0 discovery with the
project config below. Do NOT read `.claude/swarm-config.md` — everything
is already here.

---

## Project Config (replaces Phase 0)

### Quality Gates (per teammate)

Choose based on files changed:

| Changed | Command |
|---|---|
| Go only | `make api-test-unit && make api-lint` |
| Web only | `cd web && pnpm build && pnpm lint && pnpm test` |
| Both | `make test-standard` |
| GraphQL schema | Run `make api-generate && make web-schema-sync` **before** other gates |

### Full Quality Gate (Phase 5, on main)

```bash
make test-standard
```

### Post-Merge Hooks

If the merged branch touched any `graph/schema/*.graphql` file:

```bash
make api-generate && make web-schema-sync
```

If the demo walkthrough (`demo/steps.ts`) references changed UI, update it.

### Branch Naming

`worktree/<agent-name>` — use the teammate's name, not the issue ID.

### Git Workflow

Merge directly to `main` from the command line. Do not create pull requests.

I'll now run the `/swarm` skill with the Kapow project config already loaded.

Let me start by triaging the ready issues and setting up the swarm.

   123→    // URL should now have sortDir=DESC
   124→    await expect(page).toHaveURL(/[?&]sortDir=DESC/)
   125→    await expect(page).toHaveURL(/[?&]sort=name/)
   126→  })
   127→
   128→  test('URL reflects both page number and sort state @comprehensive @sorting @pagination', async ({
   129→    page,
   130→  }) => {
   131→    // Navigate with sort active
   132→    await searchWith(page, { view: 'table', sort: 'name' })
   133→    await waitForResults(page)
   134→
   135→    // Click page 2
   136→    const paginationControls = page.getByTestId('pagination-controls')
   137→    await expect(paginationControls).toBeVisible()
   138→    await paginationControls.getByRole('button', { name: '2' }).click()
   139→    await waitForResults(page)
   140→
   141→    // URL should contain both sort=name and page=2
   142→    const url = page.url()
   143→    expect(url).toMatch(/[?&]sort=name/)
   144→    expect(url).toMatch(/[?&]page=2/)
   145→  })
   146→
   147→  test('sort column headers disabled when ranking blend is active @comprehensive @sorting @blend', async ({
   148→    page,
   149→  }) => {
   150→    // Navigate to table view with a blend weight active
   151→    // The blend param format is "field:weight" (e.g., "admissionRate:50")
   152→    await searchWith(page, { view: 'table', blend: 'admissionRate:50' })
   153→    await waitForResults(page)
   154→
   155→    // When blend is active, sort is passed as null — the onSort prop is not provided
   156→    // and header buttons should render without sort interactivity.
   157→    // The sort URL params should not be present (blend clears them).
   158→    const url = page.url()
   159→    expect(url).not.toMatch(/[?&]sort=/)
   160→    expect(url).not.toMatch(/[?&]sortDir=/)
   161→  })
   162→})

1→import { useMemo } from 'react'
     2→import { Box, Button, Group, Paper, Slider, Stack, Text } from '@mantine/core'
     3→import type { SearchField } from './types'
     4→
     5→/** Ranking field metadata for the blend builder. */
     6→const RANKING_FIELDS = [
     7→  { field: 'rank_us_news_national', label: 'US News National' },
     8→  { field: 'rank_us_news_liberal_arts', label: 'US News Liberal Arts' },
     9→  { field: 'rank_forbes', label: 'Forbes' },
    10→  { field: 'rank_washington_monthly_national', label: 'Wash. Monthly National' },
    11→  { field: 'rank_washington_monthly_liberal_arts', label: 'Wash. Monthly L.A.' },
    12→  { field: 'rank_niche', label: 'Niche' },
    13→  { field: 'score_money', label: 'Money Score' },
    14→]
    15→
    16→interface RankingBlendBuilderProps {
    17→  weights: Record<string, number>
    18→  onChange: (weights: Record<string, number>) => void
    19→  /** Available search fields — used to filter to ranking fields that exist in the schema. */
    20→  fields?: SearchField[]
    21→}
    22→
    23→export function RankingBlendBuilder({ weights, onChange, fields }: RankingBlendBuilderProps) {
    24→  // Filter to ranking fields that actually exist in the field schema
    25→  const availableFields = useMemo(() => {
    26→    if (!fields || fields.length === 0) return RANKING_FIELDS
    27→    const fieldNames = new Set(fields.filter((f) => f.theme === 'RANKING').map((f) => f.name))
    28→    return RANKING_FIELDS.filter((rf) => fieldNames.has(rf.field))
    29→  }, [fields])
    30→
    31→  const totalWeight = useMemo(
    32→    () => Object.values(weights).reduce((sum, w) => sum + w, 0),
    33→    [weights],
    34→  )
    35→
    36→  const hasWeights = totalWeight > 0
    37→
    38→  function handleSliderChange(field: string, value: number) {
    39→    onChange({ ...weights, [field]: value })
    40→  }
    41→
    42→  function handleReset() {
    43→    onChange({})
    44→  }
    45→
    46→  return (
    47→    <Paper p="sm" withBorder data-testid="ranking-blend-builder">
    48→      <Text size="xs" fw={600} tt="uppercase" lts="0.05em" c="dimmed" mb="xs">
    49→        Custom Ranking Blend
    50→      </Text>
    51→
    52→      <Stack gap="xs">
    53→        {availableFields.map(({ field, label }) => {
    54→          const value = weights[field] ?? 0
    55→          const pct = totalWeight > 0 ? ((value / totalWeight) * 100).toFixed(0) : '0'
    56→
    57→          return (
    58→            <Box key={field} data-field={field}>
    59→              <Group justify="space-between" gap="xs" mb={2}>
    60→                <Text size="xs" fw={500}>
    61→                  {label}
    62→                </Text>
    63→                <Text size="xs" c="dimmed" miw={60} ta="right">
    64→                  {value > 0 ? `${value} (${pct}%)` : '0'}
    65→                </Text>
    66→              </Group>
    67→              <Slider
    68→                value={value}
    69→                onChange={(v) => handleSliderChange(field, v)}
    70→                min={0}
    71→                max={100}
    72→                step={5}
    73→                size="sm"
    74→                label={null}
    75→                aria-label={`${label} weight`}
    76→              />
    77→            </Box>
    78→          )
    79→        })}
    80→
    81→        {hasWeights && (
    82→          <Group justify="flex-end" mt="xs">
    83→            <Button variant="subtle" size="xs" onClick={handleReset}>
    84→              Reset
    85→            </Button>
    86→          </Group>
    87→        )}
    88→      </Stack>
    89→    </Paper>
    90→  )
    91→}
    92→

1→import { useState, useCallback } from 'react'
     2→import { graphql } from 'gql.tada'
     3→import { useQuery } from '@/lib/graphql'
     4→import { TextInput, Button, Group, Text, Stack } from '@mantine/core'
     5→import { MapPin, X, Loader2 } from 'lucide-react'
     6→
     7→export interface UserLocationValue {
     8→  latitude: number
     9→  longitude: number
    10→  state?: string
    11→  displayName?: string
    12→}
    13→
    14→const ResolveZipQuery = graphql(`
    15→  query ResolveZip($zip: String!) {
    16→    resolveZip(zip: $zip) {
    17→      zip
    18→      latitude
    19→      longitude
    20→      state
    21→      city
    22→    }
    23→  }
    24→`)
    25→
    26→export interface LocationInputProps {
    27→  value: UserLocationValue | undefined
    28→  onChange: (loc: UserLocationValue | undefined) => void
    29→}
    30→
    31→export function LocationInput({ value, onChange }: LocationInputProps) {
    32→  const [zipInput, setZipInput] = useState('')
    33→  const [zipError, setZipError] = useState<string | undefined>()
    34→  const [geoLoading, setGeoLoading] = useState(false)
    35→
    36→  const zipToResolve = /^\d{5}$/.test(zipInput) ? zipInput : null
    37→
    38→  const [zipResult] = useQuery<{
    39→    resolveZip: { zip: string; latitude: number; longitude: number; state: string; city: string } | null
    40→  }>({
    41→    query: ResolveZipQuery,
    42→    variables: { zip: zipToResolve ?? '' },
    43→    pause: !zipToResolve,
    44→  })
    45→
    46→  const handleZipSubmit = useCallback(() => {
    47→    if (!/^\d{5}$/.test(zipInput)) {
    48→      setZipError('Enter a 5-digit ZIP code')
    49→      return
    50→    }
    51→    setZipError(undefined)
    52→
    53→    if (zipResult.data?.resolveZip) {
    54→      const z = zipResult.data.resolveZip
    55→      onChange({
    56→        latitude: z.latitude,
    57→        longitude: z.longitude,
    58→        state: z.state,
    59→        displayName: `${z.city}, ${z.state}`,
    60→      })
    61→    } else if (zipResult.fetching) {
    62→      // Wait for result — user will need to submit again
    63→      setZipError('Looking up ZIP code…')
    64→    } else {
    65→      setZipError('ZIP code not found')
    66→    }
    67→  }, [zipInput, zipResult, onChange])
    68→
    69→  const handleGeolocation = useCallback(() => {
    70→    if (!navigator.geolocation) {
    71→      setZipError('Geolocation not supported')
    72→      return
    73→    }
    74→    setGeoLoading(true)
    75→    navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(
    76→      (pos) => {
    77→        setGeoLoading(false)
    78→        onChange({
    79→          latitude: pos.coords.latitude,
    80→          longitude: pos.coords.longitude,
    81→          displayName: `${pos.coords.latitude.toFixed(2)}°, ${pos.coords.longitude.toFixed(2)}°`,
    82→        })
    83→      },
    84→      () => {
    85→        setGeoLoading(false)
    86→        setZipError('Could not get your location')
    87→      },
    88→    )
    89→  }, [onChange])
    90→
    91→  const handleClear = useCallback(() => {
    92→    onChange(undefined)
    93→    setZipInput('')
    94→    setZipError(undefined)
    95→  }, [onChange])
    96→
    97→  if (value) {
    98→    return (
    99→      <Group gap="xs">
   100→        <MapPin size={14} />
   101→        <Text size="sm" fw={500}>
   102→          {value.displayName ?? `${value.latitude.toFixed(2)}°, ${value.longitude.toFixed(2)}°`}
   103→        </Text>
   104→        <Button variant="subtle" size="compact-xs" onClick={handleClear} aria-label="Clear location">
   105→          <X size={12} />
   106→        </Button>
   107→      </Group>
   108→    )
   109→  }
   110→
   111→  return (
   112→    <Stack gap="xs">
   113→      <Group gap="xs" align="flex-end">
   114→        <TextInput
   115→          label="ZIP code"
   116→          placeholder="e.g. 02134"
   117→          value={zipInput}
   118→          onChange={(e) => {
   119→            setZipInput(e.currentTarget.value)
   120→            setZipError(undefined)
   121→          }}
   122→          onKeyDown={(e) => {
   123→            if (e.key === 'Enter') handleZipSubmit()
   124→          }}
   125→          error={zipError}
   126→          size="xs"
   127→          style={{ flex: 1 }}
   128→        />
   129→        <Button size="xs" onClick={handleZipSubmit} disabled={zipResult.fetching}>
   130→          Go
   131→        </Button>
   132→      </Group>
   133→      <Button
   134→        variant="light"
   135→        size="xs"
   136→        leftSection={geoLoading ? <Loader2 size={14} /> : <MapPin size={14} />}
   137→        onClick={handleGeolocation}
   138→        disabled={geoLoading}
   139→      >
   140→        Use my location
   141→      </Button>
   142→    </Stack>
   143→  )
   144→}
   145→

1→import { useRef, useState } from 'react'
     2→import {
     3→  ActionIcon,
     4→  Box,
     5→  Button,
     6→  Checkbox,
     7→  Divider,
     8→  Group,
     9→  Popover,
    10→  Stack,
    11→  Text,
    12→} from '@mantine/core'
    13→import { ArrowDown, ArrowUp, Columns, GripVertical } from 'lucide-react'
    14→
    15→import { outputFieldsByTheme } from './helpers'
    16→import type { SearchOutputField } from './types'
    17→
    18→interface ColumnPickerProps {
    19→  outputFields: SearchOutputField[]
    20→  visibleColumns: Set<string>
    21→  onToggleColumn: (fieldName: string) => void
    22→  columnOrder: string[]
    23→  onReorderColumn: (fieldName: string, direction: 'up' | 'down') => void
    24→  onSetColumnOrder: (order: string[]) => void
    25→}
    26→
    27→export function ColumnPicker({
    28→  outputFields,
    29→  visibleColumns,
    30→  onToggleColumn,
    31→  columnOrder,
    32→  onReorderColumn,
    33→  onSetColumnOrder,
    34→}: ColumnPickerProps) {
    35→  const visibleFields = outputFields.filter((f) => f.visibility !== 'HIDDEN')
    36→  const groups = outputFieldsByTheme(visibleFields)
    37→
    38→  // Build ordered list of visible columns (excluding pinned "name") for the reorder section
    39→  const fieldsByName = new Map(outputFields.map((f) => [f.name, f]))
    40→  const orderedVisible = columnOrder.filter(
    41→    (name) => name !== 'name' && visibleColumns.has(name) && fieldsByName.has(name),
    42→  )
    43→
    44→  // Drag state
    45→  const dragItem = useRef<number | null>(null)
    46→  const dragOverItem = useRef<number | null>(null)
    47→  const [draggingIdx, setDraggingIdx] = useState<number | null>(null)
    48→  const [dragOverIdx, setDragOverIdx] = useState<number | null>(null)
    49→
    50→  function handleDragStart(idx: number) {
    51→    dragItem.current = idx
    52→    setDraggingIdx(idx)
    53→  }
    54→
    55→  function handleDragEnter(idx: number) {
    56→    dragOverItem.current = idx
    57→    setDragOverIdx(idx)
    58→  }
    59→
    60→  function handleDragEnd() {
    61→    if (dragItem.current !== null && dragOverItem.current !== null && dragItem.current !== dragOverItem.current) {
    62→      // Reorder orderedVisible, then map back to full columnOrder
    63→      const reordered = [...orderedVisible]
    64→      const [removed] = reordered.splice(dragItem.current, 1)
    65→      reordered.splice(dragOverItem.current, 0, removed)
    66→
    67→      // Rebuild full column order: preserve items not in orderedVisible at their positions,
    68→      // replace orderedVisible items with the reordered list
    69→      const orderedVisibleSet = new Set(orderedVisible)
    70→      const newOrder: string[] = []
    71→      let reorderIdx = 0
    72→      for (const name of columnOrder) {
    73→        if (orderedVisibleSet.has(name)) {
    74→          newOrder.push(reordered[reorderIdx++])
    75→        } else {
    76→          newOrder.push(name)
    77→        }
    78→      }
    79→      onSetColumnOrder(newOrder)
    80→    }
    81→    dragItem.current = null
    82→    dragOverItem.current = null
    83→    setDraggingIdx(null)
    84→    setDragOverIdx(null)
    85→  }
    86→
    87→  return (
    88→    <Popover width={300} position="bottom-end" shadow="md">
    89→      <Popover.Target>
    90→        <Button variant="default" leftSection={<Columns size={16} />}>
    91→          Columns
    92→        </Button>
    93→      </Popover.Target>
    94→      <Popover.Dropdown>
    95→        <Box style={{ maxHeight: 500, overflowY: 'auto' }}>
    96→          <Stack gap="md">
    97→            {groups.map((group) => (
    98→              <Box key={group.theme}>
    99→                <Text fw={600} fz="sm" mb="xs">
   100→                  {group.label}
   101→                </Text>
   102→                <Stack gap="xs">
   103→                  {group.fields.map((field) => {
   104→                    const isName = field.name === 'name'
   105→                    return (
   106→                      <Group key={field.name} gap="xs">
   107→                        <Checkbox
   108→                          label={field.label}
   109→                          checked={isName || visibleColumns.has(field.name)}
   110→                          disabled={isName}
   111→                          onChange={() => onToggleColumn(field.name)}
   112→                          size="sm"
   113→                        />
   114→                      </Group>
   115→                    )
   116→                  })}
   117→                </Stack>
   118→              </Box>
   119→            ))}
   120→
   121→            {orderedVisible.length > 0 && (
   122→              <>
   123→                <Divider />
   124→                <Box>
   125→                  <Text fw={600} fz="sm" mb="xs">
   126→                    Column Order
   127→                  </Text>
   128→                  <Stack gap={4}>
   129→                    {orderedVisible.map((name, idx) => {
   130→                      const field = fieldsByName.get(name)
   131→                      if (!field) return null
   132→                      const isDragging = draggingIdx === idx
   133→                      const isDragOver = dragOverIdx === idx && draggingIdx !== idx
   134→                      return (
   135→                        <Group
   136→                          key={name}
   137→                          gap="xs"
   138→                          justify="space-between"
   139→                          wrap="nowrap"
   140→                          draggable
   141→                          onDragStart={() => handleDragStart(idx)}
   142→                          onDragEnter={() => handleDragEnter(idx)}
   143→                          onDragEnd={handleDragEnd}
   144→                          onDragOver={(e) => e.preventDefault()}
   145→                          data-testid={`column-order-item-${name}`}
   146→                          style={{
   147→                            opacity: isDragging ? 0.5 : 1,
   148→                            borderTop: isDragOver ? '2px solid var(--mantine-color-brand-5)' : '2px solid transparent',
   149→                            cursor: 'grab',
   150→                            borderRadius: 4,
   151→                            padding: '2px 0',
   152→                          }}
   153→                        >
   154→                          <Group gap={4} wrap="nowrap" style={{ flex: 1, minWidth: 0 }}>
   155→                            <GripVertical size={14} style={{ flexShrink: 0, color: 'var(--mantine-color-dimmed)' }} />
   156→                            <Text fz="sm" truncate>
   157→                              {field.label}
   158→                            </Text>
   159→                          </Group>
   160→                          <Group gap={2} wrap="nowrap">
   161→                            <ActionIcon
   162→                              variant="subtle"
   163→                              size="sm"
   164→                              disabled={idx === 0}
   165→                              onClick={() => onReorderColumn(name, 'up')}
   166→                              aria-label={`Move ${field.label} up`}
   167→                            >
   168→                              <ArrowUp size={14} />
   169→                            </ActionIcon>
   170→                            <ActionIcon
   171→                              variant="subtle"
   172→                              size="sm"
   173→                              disabled={idx === orderedVisible.length - 1}
   174→                              onClick={() => onReorderColumn(name, 'down')}
   175→                              aria-label={`Move ${field.label} down`}
   176→                            >
   177→                              <ArrowDown size={14} />
   178→                            </ActionIcon>
   179→                          </Group>
   180→                        </Group>
   181→                      )
   182→                    })}
   183→                  </Stack>
   184→                </Box>
   185→              </>
   186→            )}
   187→          </Stack>
   188→        </Box>
   189→      </Popover.Dropdown>
   190→    </Popover>
   191→  )
   192→}
   193→

1→import { Link, NavLink } from 'react-router-dom'
     2→import { Group, Container, Text, Burger, Drawer, Stack } from '@mantine/core'
     3→import { useDisclosure } from '@mantine/hooks'
     4→import { GraduationCap } from 'lucide-react'
     5→import { useAuthStore } from '@/stores/authStore'
     6→import { SignInMenu } from '@/components/auth/SignInMenu'
     7→import { UserMenu } from '@/components/auth/UserMenu'
     8→
     9→const navLinks = [
    10→  { to: '/', label: 'Home' },
    11→  { to: '/about', label: 'About' },
    12→]
    13→
    14→export function Header() {
    15→  const [drawerOpened, { toggle: toggleDrawer, close: closeDrawer }] = useDisclosure(false)
    16→  const user = useAuthStore((s) => s.user)
    17→  const loading = useAuthStore((s) => s.loading)
    18→
    19→  return (
    20→    <header
    21→      style={{
    22→        position: 'sticky',
    23→        top: 0,
    24→        zIndex: 50,
    25→        width: '100%',
    26→        backgroundColor: 'var(--color-primary)',
    27→      }}
    28→    >
    29→      <Container size="xl" px="md">
    30→        <Group justify="space-between" h={64}>
    31→          {/* Wordmark */}
    32→          <Link
    33→            to="/"
    34→            style={{
    35→              display: 'flex',
    36→              alignItems: 'center',
    37→              gap: 8,
    38→              color: '#fff',
    39→              textDecoration: 'none',
    40→            }}
    41→          >
    42→            <GraduationCap style={{ width: 28, height: 28, color: 'var(--color-accent)' }} />
    43→            <Text fw={600} size="lg" style={{ letterSpacing: '-0.025em' }}>
    44→              College Power Search
    45→            </Text>
    46→          </Link>
    47→
    48→          {/* Desktop nav */}
    49→          <Group gap="xl" visibleFrom="md">
    50→            {navLinks.map(({ to, label }) => (
    51→              <NavLink
    52→                key={to}
    53→                to={to}
    54→                style={({ isActive }) => ({
    55→                  fontSize: '0.875rem',
    56→                  fontWeight: 500,
    57→                  color: isActive ? 'var(--color-accent)' : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.8)',
    58→                  textDecoration: 'none',
    59→                  transition: 'color 150ms',
    60→                })}
    61→              >
    62→                {label}
    63→              </NavLink>
    64→            ))}
    65→          </Group>
    66→
    67→          {/* Desktop actions */}
    68→          <Group gap="sm" visibleFrom="md">
    69→            {loading ? null : user ? <UserMenu /> : <SignInMenu />}
    70→          </Group>
    71→
    72→          {/* Mobile burger */}
    73→          <Burger
    74→            opened={drawerOpened}
    75→            onClick={toggleDrawer}
    76→            hiddenFrom="md"
    77→            color="white"
    78→            aria-label="Toggle navigation"
    79→          />
    80→        </Group>
    81→      </Container>
    82→
    83→      {/* Mobile drawer */}
    84→      <Drawer
    85→        opened={drawerOpened}
    86→        onClose={closeDrawer}
    87→        size="xs"
    88→        padding="md"
    89→        title="Navigation"
    90→        hiddenFrom="md"
    91→        zIndex={100}
    92→      >
    93→        <Stack gap="lg">
    94→          {navLinks.map(({ to, label }) => (
    95→            <NavLink
    96→              key={to}
    97→              to={to}
    98→              onClick={closeDrawer}
    99→              style={({ isActive }) => ({
   100→                fontSize: '1rem',
   101→                fontWeight: 500,
   102→                color: isActive ? 'var(--color-accent)' : 'var(--color-primary)',
   103→                textDecoration: 'none',
   104→              })}
   105→            >
   106→              {label}
   107→            </NavLink>
   108→          ))}
   109→          {loading ? null : user ? <UserMenu /> : <SignInMenu />}
   110→        </Stack>
   111→      </Drawer>
   112→    </header>
   113→  )
   114→}

1→import { Menu } from '@mantine/core'
     2→import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'
     3→import { supabase } from '@/lib/supabase'
     4→
     5→function handleGoogleSignIn() {
     6→  void supabase.auth.signInWithOAuth({
     7→    provider: 'google',
     8→    options: {
     9→      redirectTo: `${window.location.origin}/auth/callback`,
    10→    },
    11→  })
    12→}
    13→
    14→export function SignInMenu() {
    15→  return (
    16→    <Menu shadow="md" width={200}>
    17→      <Menu.Target>
    18→        <Button variant="accent-outline" size="sm">
    19→          Sign In
    20→        </Button>
    21→      </Menu.Target>
    22→      <Menu.Dropdown>
    23→        <Menu.Item onClick={handleGoogleSignIn}>Continue with Google</Menu.Item>
    24→      </Menu.Dropdown>
    25→    </Menu>
    26→  )
    27→}

1→import { Menu, Avatar, Group, Text } from '@mantine/core'
     2→import { useAuthStore } from '@/stores/authStore'
     3→
     4→export function UserMenu() {
     5→  const user = useAuthStore((s) => s.user)
     6→  const signOut = useAuthStore((s) => s.signOut)
     7→
     8→  if (!user) return null
     9→
    10→  const fullName = user.user_metadata?.full_name as string | undefined
    11→  const avatarUrl = user.user_metadata?.avatar_url as string | undefined
    12→  const displayName = fullName ?? user.email ?? ''
    13→  const initials = displayName
    14→    .split(' ')
    15→    .map((w) => w[0])
    16→    .join('')
    17→    .slice(0, 2)
    18→    .toUpperCase()
    19→
    20→  return (
    21→    <Menu shadow="md" width={200}>
    22→      <Menu.Target>
    23→        <Group gap="xs" style={{ cursor: 'pointer' }}>
    24→          <Avatar src={avatarUrl} alt={displayName} radius="xl" size="sm" color="accent">
    25→            {initials}
    26→          </Avatar>
    27→        </Group>
    28→      </Menu.Target>
    29→      <Menu.Dropdown>
    30→        <Menu.Label>
    31→          <Text size="sm" fw={500} truncate>
    32→            {displayName}
    33→          </Text>
    34→          {user.email && (
    35→            <Text size="xs" c="dimmed" truncate>
    36→              {user.email}
    37→            </Text>
    38→          )}
    39→        </Menu.Label>
    40→        <Menu.Divider />
    41→        <Menu.Item c="red" onClick={() => void signOut()}>
    42→          Sign out
    43→        </Menu.Item>
    44→      </Menu.Dropdown>
    45→    </Menu>
    46→  )
    47→}

1→import { useState } from 'react'
     2→import { Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'
     3→import {
     4→  Container,
     5→  Title,
     6→  Text,
     7→  TextInput,
     8→  NativeSelect,
     9→  SimpleGrid,
    10→  Group,
    11→  Stack,
    12→  Card,
    13→  Box,
    14→} from '@mantine/core'
    15→import { Search, BarChart3, Filter, Bookmark } from 'lucide-react'
    16→import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'
    17→import { US_STATES, SampleSearchCarousel } from '@/components/search'
    18→
    19→const RANKING_OPTIONS = [
    20→  { value: '', label: 'Any rank' },
    21→  { value: '25', label: 'Top 25' },
    22→  { value: '50', label: 'Top 50' },
    23→  { value: '100', label: 'Top 100' },
    24→  { value: '200', label: 'Top 200' },
    25→]
    26→
    27→const features = [
    28→  {
    29→    icon: BarChart3,
    30→    title: 'Comprehensive Data',
    31→    description:
    32→      'Access detailed information on thousands of colleges — from acceptance rates and SAT scores to net price and graduation outcomes.',
    33→  },
    34→  {
    35→    icon: Filter,
    36→    title: 'Faceted Search',
    37→    description:
    38→      'Narrow your list by dozens of criteria at once. Combine filters across academics, cost, location, size, and campus culture.',
    39→  },
    40→  {
    41→    icon: Bookmark,
    42→    title: 'Save & Compare',
    43→    description:
    44→      'Build your personal college list, save searches, and compare schools side by side to make confident decisions.',
    45→  },
    46→]
    47→
    48→export function Home() {
    49→  const [name, setName] = useState('')
    50→  const [state, setState] = useState('')
    51→  const [rankMax, setRankMax] = useState('')
    52→  const [major, setMajor] = useState('')
    53→  const navigate = useNavigate()
    54→
    55→  function buildSearchParams(): URLSearchParams {
    56→    const params = new URLSearchParams()
    57→    if (name.trim()) params.set('q', name.trim())
    58→    if (state) params.set('state', state)
    59→    if (rankMax) params.set('rank_us_news_national', rankMax)
    60→    if (major.trim()) params.set('fields_of_study', major.trim())
    61→    return params
    62→  }
    63→
    64→  function handleSearch(e: React.FormEvent) {
    65→    e.preventDefault()
    66→    const params = buildSearchParams()
    67→    const qs = params.toString()
    68→    navigate(qs ? `/search?${qs}` : '/search')
    69→  }
    70→
    71→  const moreFiltersParams = buildSearchParams()
    72→  const moreFiltersHref = moreFiltersParams.toString()
    73→    ? `/search?${moreFiltersParams.toString()}`
    74→    : '/search'
    75→
    76→  return (
    77→    <main style={{ display: 'flex', flex: 1, flexDirection: 'column' }}>
    78→      {/* ── Hero ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */}
    79→      <Box component="section" bg="gray.0" py={{ base: 40, sm: 60, md: 80 }} px="md">
    80→        <Container size="sm" style={{ textAlign: 'center' }}>
    81→          <Title order={1} mb="sm" c="brand.9" fz={{ base: 36, sm: 48, lg: 60 }}>
    82→            College Power Search
    83→          </Title>
    84→          <Text size="lg" c="dimmed" mb="xl">
    85→            Find your perfect college — by academics, cost, location, athletics, and more.
    86→          </Text>
    87→
    88→          <form onSubmit={handleSearch}>
    89→            <Stack gap="md">
    90→              {/* Name search */}
    91→              <TextInput
    92→                type="search"
    93→                placeholder="College name…"
    94→                value={name}
    95→                onChange={(e) => setName(e.target.value)}
    96→                leftSection={<Search size={16} />}
    97→                size="lg"
    98→              />
    99→
   100→              {/* Facet row */}
   101→              <SimpleGrid cols={{ base: 1, sm: 3 }} spacing="sm">
   102→                <NativeSelect
   103→                  label="State"
   104→                  value={state}
   105→                  onChange={(e) => setState(e.target.value)}
   106→                  data={[
   107→                    { value: '', label: 'Any state' },
   108→                    ...US_STATES.map((s) => ({ value: s.value, label: s.label })),
   109→                  ]}
   110→                />
   111→                <NativeSelect
   112→                  label="Ranking"
   113→                  value={rankMax}
   114→                  onChange={(e) => setRankMax(e.target.value)}
   115→                  data={RANKING_OPTIONS}
   116→                />
   117→                <TextInput
   118→                  label="Major"
   119→                  placeholder="e.g. Biology"
   120→                  value={major}
   121→                  onChange={(e) => setMajor(e.target.value)}
   122→                />
   123→              </SimpleGrid>
   124→
   125→              {/* Actions */}
   126→              <Group justify="space-between">
   127→                <Link
   128→                  to={moreFiltersHref}
   129→                  style={{
   130→                    fontSize: '0.875rem',
   131→                    fontWeight: 500,
   132→                    color: 'var(--color-accent)',
   133→                    textDecoration: 'none',
   134→                  }}
   135→                >
   136→                  More filters ›
   137→                </Link>
   138→                <Button type="submit" size="lg" variant="accent">
   139→                  Search
   140→                </Button>
   141→              </Group>
   142→            </Stack>
   143→          </form>
   144→        </Container>
   145→      </Box>
   146→
   147→      {/* ── Sample searches ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */}
   148→      <SampleSearchCarousel />
   149→
   150→      {/* ── Why CPS? ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── */}
   151→      <Box component="section" bg="gray.0" py="xl" px="md">
   152→        <Container size="lg">
   153→          <Title order={2} ta="center" mb="xl" c="brand.9">
   154→            Why College Power Search?
   155→          </Title>
   156→
   157→          <SimpleGrid cols={{ base: 1, sm: 3 }} spacing="lg">
   158→            {features.map(({ icon: Icon, title, description }) => (
   159→              <Card key={title} shadow="sm" withBorder>
   160→                <Box
   161→                  mb="sm"
   162→                  style={{
   163→                    display: 'inline-flex',
   164→                    alignItems: 'center',
   165→                    justifyContent: 'center',
   166→                    width: 44,
   167→                    height: 44,
   168→                    borderRadius: 8,
   169→                    backgroundColor: 'var(--color-primary)',
   170→                  }}
   171→                >
   172→                  <Icon size={20} color="#fff" />
   173→                </Box>
   174→                <Text fw={600} size="lg" c="brand.9" mb="xs">
   175→                  {title}
   176→                </Text>
   177→                <Text size="sm" c="dimmed" lh={1.625}>
   178→                  {description}
   179→                </Text>
   180→              </Card>
   181→            ))}
   182→          </SimpleGrid>
   183→        </Container>
   184→      </Box>
   185→    </main>
   186→  )
   187→}

1→import { useEffect, useMemo, useState, useCallback } from 'react'

    22→  type SearchField,
    23→  type SearchInstitution,

    31→  parseBlendParam,

    49→// ── Constants ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    50→
    51→const MAX_RESULTS = 100
    52→const PAGE_SIZE_OPTIONS = [5, 10, 20, 50, 100]
    53→const DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE = 20
    54→const VISIBLE_COLUMNS_KEY = 'kapow:visible-columns'
    55→const COLUMN_ORDER_KEY = 'kapow:column-order'
    56→const VIEW_MODE_KEY = 'kapow:results-view'
    57→const VALID_VIEW_MODES: ViewMode[] = ['card', 'list', 'table', 'map']
    58→
    59→// ── GraphQL queries ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    60→
    61→const SearchFieldsQuery = graphql(`
    62→  query SearchFields {
    63→    searchFields {
    64→      __typename
    65→      name
    66→      label
    67→      description
    68→      theme
    69→      visibility
    70→      searchability
    71→      exportable
    72→      dataSourceID
    73→      ... on ChoiceSearchField {
    74→        options {
    75→          value
    76→          displayName
    77→        }
    78→        minSelections
    79→        maxSelections
    80→      }
    81→      ... on NumericalSearchField {
    82→        min
    83→        max
    84→        step
    85→        unit
    86→        defaultValue
    87→      }
    88→      ... on NumericalRangeSearchField {
    89→        min
    90→        max
    91→        step
    92→        unit
    93→        defaultLower
    94→        defaultUpper
    95→      }
    96→      ... on GeoSearchField {
    97→        defaultLatitude
    98→        defaultLongitude
    99→        maxRadiusMiles
   100→      }
   101→    }
   102→  }
   103→`)
   104→
   105→const SearchOutputFieldsQuery = graphql(`
   106→  query SearchOutputFields {
   107→    searchOutputFields {
   108→      name
   109→      label
   110→      theme
   111→      defaultVisible
   112→      exportable
   113→      dataSourceID

   120→
   121→const SearchQuery = graphql(`
   122→  query Search($filters: [FilterInput!], $limit: Int, $offset: Int, $sort: SortInput, $userLocation: UserLocation, $rankingBlend: [RankingBlendWeight!]) {
   123→    search(filters: $filters, limit: $limit, offset: $offset, sort: $sort, userLocation: $userLocation, rankingBlend: $rankingBlend) {
   124→      results {
   125→        unitID
   126→        name

   131→        distance

   175→        admissions {

   178→        athletics {

   182→        climate {

   188→          partisanDirection

   190→        }

   192→      total

   195→    }
   196→  }
   197→`)

   199→// ── Search page ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   200→
   201→export function Search() {
   202→  const [searchParams, setSearchParams] = useSearchParams()
   203→  const [selectedUnitID, setSelectedUnitID] = useState<string | null>(null)
   204→  const [detailOpened, setDetailOpened] = useState(false)
   205→  const [filtersOpened, { toggle: toggleFilters }] = useDisclosure(false)
   206→  const isDesktop = useMediaQuery('(min-width: 62em)')
   207→
   208→  // ── View mode state ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   209→  const [viewMode, setViewMode] = useState<ViewMode>(() => {
   210→    const fromUrl = searchParams.get('view')
   211→    if (fromUrl && VALID_VIEW_MODES.includes(fromUrl as ViewMode)) return fromUrl as ViewMode
   212→    const fromStorage = localStorage.getItem(VIEW_MODE_KEY)
   213→    if (fromStorage && VALID_VIEW_MODES.includes(fromStorage as ViewMode))
   214→      return fromStorage as ViewMode
   215→    return 'card'
   216→  })
   217→
   218→  const handleViewModeChange = useCallback(
   219→    (mode: ViewMode) => {
   220→      setViewMode(mode)
   221→      localStorage.setItem(VIEW_MODE_KEY, mode)
   222→      setSearchParams(
   223→        (prev) => {
   224→          const next = new URLSearchParams(prev)
   225→          if (mode === 'card') {
   226→            next.delete('view')
   227→          } else {
   228→            next.set('view', mode)
   229→          }
   230→          return next
   231→        },
   232→        { replace: true },
   233→      )
   234→    },
   235→    [setSearchParams],
   236→  )
   237→
   238→  const dataSources = useDataSources()
   239→
   240→  const [fieldsResult] = useQuery<{ searchFields: SearchField[] }>({
   241→    query: SearchFieldsQuery,
   242→  })
   243→
   244→  const [outputFieldsResult] = useQuery<{ searchOutputFields: SearchOutputField[] }>({
   245→    query: SearchOutputFieldsQuery,
   246→  })
   247→
   248→  const fields = useMemo(
   249→    () => fieldsResult.data?.searchFields ?? [],
   250→    [fieldsResult.data?.searchFields],
   251→  )
   252→
   253→  const allOutputFields = useMemo(
   254→    () => outputFieldsResult.data?.searchOutputFields ?? [],
   255→    [outputFieldsResult.data?.searchOutputFields],
   256→  )
   257→
   258→  // ── Column visibility state ─────────────────────────────────────────────
   259→  const [visibleColumns, setVisibleColumns] = useState<Set<string>>(() => {
   260→    const stored = localStorage.getItem(VISIBLE_COLUMNS_KEY)
   261→    if (stored) {
   262→      try {
   263→        const arr = JSON.parse(stored) as string[]
   264→        if (Array.isArray(arr) && arr.length > 0) return new Set(arr)
   265→      } catch {
   266→        // ignore parse errors
   267→      }
   268→    }
   269→    return new Set<string>()
   270→  })
   271→
   272→  // ── Column order state (excludes pinned "name" column) ────────────────
   273→  const [columnOrder, setColumnOrder] = useState<string[]>(() => {
   274→    const stored = localStorage.getItem(COLUMN_ORDER_KEY)
   275→    if (stored) {
   276→      try {
   277→        const arr = JSON.parse(stored) as string[]
   278→        if (Array.isArray(arr) && arr.length > 0) return arr
   279→      } catch {
   280→        // ignore parse errors
   281→      }
   282→    }
   283→    return []
   284→  })
   285→
   286→  // Initialize from defaultVisible when output fields load
   287→  useEffect(() => {
   288→    if (allOutputFields.length > 0 && visibleColumns.size === 0) {
   289→      const defaults = new Set(
   290→        allOutputFields.filter((f) => f.defaultVisible).map((f) => f.name),
   291→      )
   292→      // Always include core fields
   293→      defaults.add('name')
   294→      defaults.add('city')
   295→      defaults.add('state')
   296→      setVisibleColumns(defaults)
   297→    }
   298→  }, [allOutputFields, visibleColumns.size])
   299→
   300→  // Initialize column order when output fields load and no saved order exists
   301→  useEffect(() => {
   302→    if (allOutputFields.length > 0 && columnOrder.length === 0 && visibleColumns.size > 0) {
   303→      // Default order: city, state, distance, myPrice, then other visible fields
   304→      const defaultOrder = ['city', 'state', 'distance', 'myPrice']
   305→      const outputFieldsByName = new Map(allOutputFields.map((f) => [f.name, f]))
   306→      for (const name of visibleColumns) {
   307→        if (name !== 'name' && !defaultOrder.includes(name) && outputFieldsByName.has(name)) {
   308→          defaultOrder.push(name)
   309→        }
   310→      }
   311→      setColumnOrder(defaultOrder)
   312→    }
   313→  }, [allOutputFields, columnOrder.length, visibleColumns])
   314→
   315→  // Persist to localStorage
   316→  useEffect(() => {
   317→    if (visibleColumns.size > 0) {
   318→      localStorage.setItem(VISIBLE_COLUMNS_KEY, JSON.stringify([...visibleColumns]))
   319→    }
   320→  }, [visibleColumns])
   321→
   322→  useEffect(() => {
   323→    if (columnOrder.length > 0) {
   324→      localStorage.setItem(COLUMN_ORDER_KEY, JSON.stringify(columnOrder))
   325→    }
   326→  }, [columnOrder])
   327→
   328→  const handleToggleColumn = useCallback((fieldName: string) => {
   329→    setVisibleColumns((prev) => {
   330→      const next = new Set(prev)
   331→      if (next.has(fieldName)) {
   332→        next.delete(fieldName)
   333→      } else {
   334→        next.add(fieldName)
   335→      }
   336→      return next
   337→    })
   338→    // Update column order: add to end when toggling on, remove when toggling off
   339→    setColumnOrder((prev) => {
   340→      if (prev.includes(fieldName)) {
   341→        return prev.filter((n) => n !== fieldName)
   342→      }
   343→      return [...prev, fieldName]
   344→    })
   345→  }, [])
   346→
   347→  const handleReorderColumn = useCallback((fieldName: string, direction: 'up' | 'down') => {
   348→    setColumnOrder((prev) => {
   349→      const idx = prev.indexOf(fieldName)
   350→      if (idx === -1) return prev
   351→      const swapIdx = direction === 'up' ? idx - 1 : idx + 1
   352→      if (swapIdx < 0 || swapIdx >= prev.length) return prev
   353→      const next = [...prev]
   354→      next[idx] = prev[swapIdx]
   355→      next[swapIdx] = prev[idx]
   356→      return next
   357→    })
   358→  }, [])
   359→
   360→  const handleSetColumnOrder = useCallback((order: string[]) => {
   361→    setColumnOrder(order)
   362→  }, [])
   363→
   364→  // Derive filter state from URL search params + field metadata
   365→  const filters = useMemo(
   366→    () => (fields.length === 0 ? {} : parseUrlToFilters(searchParams, fields)),
   367→    [searchParams, fields],
   368→  )
   369→
   370→  // User location from URL params
   371→  const userLocation = useMemo(() => {
   372→    const lat = searchParams.get('userLat')
   373→    const lng = searchParams.get('userLng')
   374→    if (lat == null || lng == null) return undefined
   375→    const latitude = Number(lat)
   376→    const longitude = Number(lng)
   377→    if (Number.isNaN(latitude) || Number.isNaN(longitude)) return undefined
   378→    const state = searchParams.get('userState') ?? undefined
   379→    return { latitude, longitude, state }
   380→  }, [searchParams])
   381→
   382→  // Sort state from URL params
   383→  const sort = useMemo((): SortState | undefined => {
   384→    const sortParam = searchParams.get('sort')
   385→    if (!sortParam) return undefined
   386→    const dirParam = searchParams.get('sortDir')
   387→    const direction = dirParam === 'DESC' ? ('DESC' as const) : ('ASC' as const)
   388→    return { field: sortParam, direction }
   389→  }, [searchParams])
   390→
   391→  // Ranking blend weights from URL params
   392→  const blendWeights = useMemo(
   393→    () => parseBlendParam(searchParams.get('blend')),
   394→    [searchParams],
   395→  )
   396→  const hasBlend = Object.keys(blendWeights).length > 0
   397→
   398→  // Pagination state from URL params
   399→  const pageSize = useMemo(() => {
   400→    const ps = Number(searchParams.get('pageSize'))
   401→    return PAGE_SIZE_OPTIONS.includes(ps) ? ps : DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE
   402→  }, [searchParams])
   403→
   404→  const page = useMemo(() => {
   405→    const p = Number(searchParams.get('page'))
   406→    return p >= 1 ? p : 1
   407→  }, [searchParams])
   408→
   409→  const offset = (page - 1) * pageSize
   410→
   411→  const [searchResult] = useQuery<{
   412→    search: { results: SearchInstitution[]; total: number; limit: number; offset: number }
   413→  }>({
   414→    query: SearchQuery,
   415→    variables: {
   416→      filters: buildFilterInputs(filters),
   417→      limit: pageSize,
   418→      offset,
   419→      sort: hasBlend ? null : (sort ?? null),
   420→      userLocation: userLocation
   421→        ? {
   422→            latitude: userLocation.latitude,
   423→            longitude: userLocation.longitude,
   424→            state: userLocation.state,
   425→          }
   426→        : null,
   427→      rankingBlend: hasBlend
   428→        ? Object.entries(blendWeights).map(([field, weight]) => ({ field, weight }))
   429→        : null,
   430→    },
   431→    pause: fieldsResult.fetching,
   432→  })
   433→
   434→  const themeGroups = useMemo(
   435→    () => fieldsByTheme(fields.filter((f) => f.visibility !== 'HIDDEN')),
   436→    [fields],
   437→  )
   438→
   439→  const institutions = useMemo(
   440→    () => searchResult.data?.search.results ?? [],
   441→    [searchResult.data?.search.results],
   442→  )
   443→  const total = searchResult.data?.search.total ?? 0
   444→  const cappedTotal = Math.min(total, MAX_RESULTS)
   445→  const totalPages = Math.ceil(cappedTotal / pageSize)
   446→
   447→  // "Showing X–Y of Z" display values
   448→  const showStart = cappedTotal === 0 ? 0 : offset + 1
   449→  const showEnd = Math.min(offset + pageSize, cappedTotal)
   450→
   451→  const hasLocation = userLocation != null
   452→  const hasState = userLocation?.state != null
   453→
   454→  function handleFilterChange(fieldName: string, value: unknown | undefined) {
   455→    setSearchParams(
   456→      (prev) => {
   457→        const next = new URLSearchParams(prev)
   458→        // Convert legacy ?q= to canonical ?name= so the value is preserved
   459→        const q = next.get('q')
   460→        if (q) {
   461→          next.delete('q')
   462→          if (!next.has('name') && fieldName !== 'name') {
   463→            next.set('name', q)
   464→          }
   465→        }
   466→        if (value === undefined) {
   467→          next.delete(fieldName)
   468→        } else {
   469→          next.set(fieldName, serializeFilterValue(value))
   470→        }
   471→        // Reset to page 1 when filters change
   472→        next.delete('page')
   473→        return next
   474→      },
   475→      { replace: true },
   476→    )
   477→  }
   478→
   479→  const handleLocationChange = useCallback(
   480→    (loc: UserLocationValue | undefined) => {
   481→      setSearchParams(
   482→        (prev) => {
   483→          const next = new URLSearchParams(prev)
   484→          if (loc) {
   485→            next.set('userLat', String(loc.latitude))
   486→            next.set('userLng', String(loc.longitude))
   487→            if (loc.state) {
   488→              next.set('userState', loc.state)
   489→            } else {
   490→              next.delete('userState')
   491→            }
   492→          } else {
   493→            next.delete('userLat')
   494→            next.delete('userLng')
   495→            next.delete('userState')
   496→            if (next.get('sort') === 'distance') {
   497→              next.delete('sort')
   498→              next.delete('sortDir')
   499→            }
   500→          }
   501→          next.delete('page')
   502→          return next
   503→        },
   504→        { replace: true },
   505→      )
   506→    },
   507→    [setSearchParams],
   508→  )
   509→
   510→  const handleSort = useCallback(
   511→    (field: string) => {
   512→      setSearchParams(
   513→        (prev) => {
   514→          const next = new URLSearchParams(prev)
   515→          const currentField = next.get('sort')
   516→          const currentDir = next.get('sortDir') ?? 'ASC'
   517→
   518→          if (currentField === field) {
   519→            if (currentDir === 'ASC') {
   520→              // ASC → DESC
   521→              next.set('sortDir', 'DESC')
   522→            } else {
   523→              // DESC → clear
   524→              next.delete('sort')
   525→              next.delete('sortDir')
   526→            }
   527→          } else {
   528→            // New field → ASC
   529→            next.set('sort', field)
   530→            next.delete('sortDir')
   531→          }
   532→          next.delete('page')
   533→          return next
   534→        },
   535→        { replace: true },
   536→      )
   537→    },
   538→    [setSearchParams],
   539→  )
   540→
   541→  const handleBlendChange = useCallback(
   542→    (weights: Record<string, number>) => {
   543→      setSearchParams(
   544→        (prev) => {
   545→          const next = new URLSearchParams(prev)
   546→          const serialized = serializeBlendWeights(weights)
   547→          if (serialized) {
   548→            next.set('blend', serialized)
   549→            // Clear sort when blend is active — blend determines ordering
   550→            next.delete('sort')
   551→            next.delete('sortDir')
   552→          } else {
   553→            next.delete('blend')
   554→          }
   555→          next.delete('page')
   556→          return next
   557→        },
   558→        { replace: true },
   559→      )
   560→    },
   561→    [setSearchParams],
   562→  )
   563→
   564→  function handlePageChange(newPage: number) {
   565→    setSearchParams(
   566→      (prev) => {
   567→        const next = new URLSearchParams(prev)
   568→        if (newPage <= 1) {
   569→          next.delete('page')
   570→        } else {
   571→          next.set('page', String(newPage))
   572→        }
   573→        return next
   574→      },
   575→      { replace: true },
   576→    )
   577→  }
   578→
   579→  function handlePageSizeChange(newSize: number) {
   580→    setSearchParams(
   581→      (prev) => {
   582→        const next = new URLSearchParams(prev)
   583→        if (newSize === DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE) {
   584→          next.delete('pageSize')
   585→        } else {
   586→          next.set('pageSize', String(newSize))
   587→        }
   588→        next.delete('page')
   589→        return next
   590→      },
   591→      { replace: true },
   592→    )
   593→  }
   594→
   595→  const handleExportCsv = useCallback(() => {
   596→    const params = new URLSearchParams()
   597→    const filterInputs = buildFilterInputs(filters)
   598→    if (filterInputs.length > 0) {
   599→      params.set('filters', JSON.stringify(filterInputs))
   600→    }
   601→    if (sort) {
   602→      params.set('sort', sort.field)
   603→    }
   604→    if (userLocation) {
   605→      params.set('userLat', String(userLocation.latitude))
   606→      params.set('userLng', String(userLocation.longitude))
   607→      if (userLocation.state) {
   608→        params.set('userState', userLocation.state)
   609→      }
   610→    }
   611→    window.open(`/api/export/csv?${params.toString()}`, '_blank')
   612→  }, [filters, sort, userLocation])
   613→
   614→  const handleExportPdf = useCallback(() => {
   615→    const activeFilters = fields
   616→      .filter((f) => filters[f.name] !== undefined)
   617→      .map((f) => f.label)
   618→    downloadSearchPdf({

   622→      maxRows: MAX_RESULTS,

   625→  }, [institutions, allOutputFields, fields, filters, dataSources])
   626→
   627→  const filterContent = (
   628→    <>
   629→      <Title order={6} tt="uppercase" fz="xs" fw={600} lts="0.05em" c="brand.9" mb="md">
   630→        Filters
   631→      </Title>
   632→
   633→      <Box mb="md">
   634→        <Text size="xs" fw={600} tt="uppercase" lts="0.05em" c="dimmed" mb="xs">
   635→          Your Location
   636→        </Text>
   637→        <LocationInput
   638→          value={
   639→            userLocation
   640→              ? {

     7→export const SAMPLE_SEARCH_QUERY = graphql(`

    11→        unitID
    12→        name

    15→      }
    16→      total
    17→    }
    18→  }

    24→    total: number
    25→  }
    26→}
    27→
    28→export function useSampleSearchQuery(filters: Array<{ field: string; value: unknown }>) {
    29→  return useQuery<SampleSearchResult>({
    30→    query: SAMPLE_SEARCH_QUERY,
    31→    variables: { filters, limit: 4 },
    32→  })
    33→}
    34→
    35→interface SampleSearchCardProps {

    65→          borderRadius: 8,
    66→          backgroundColor: 'var(--color-primary)',
    67→        }}
    68→      >
    69→        <Icon size={20} color="#fff" />

    92→        {data && (

1→import { Container, Title, Box } from '@mantine/core'

     6→
     7→function SampleSearchSlide({ sample }: { sample: SampleSearch }) {

    12→
    13→  return (
    14→    <Carousel.Slide>
    15→      <SampleSearchCard sample={sample} fetching={result.fetching} data={result.data} />

    18→}
    19→

    21→  return (
    22→    <Box component="section" py="xl" px="md">

    26→        </Title>
    27→
    28→        <Carousel
    29→          slideSize={{ base: '100%', sm: '50%', md: '33.333%' }}
    30→          slideGap="lg"
    31→          align="start"
    32→          loop
    33→          withControls
    34→          styles={{ slide: { display: 'flex' } }}

---

## Kapow Web Frontend — E2E Test UI Components & Selectors

### 1. **Ranking Blend Builder**

**Location**: `/web/src/components/search/RankingBlendBuilder.tsx`

**Purpose**: Custom ranking blend UI with weighted sliders for multiple ranking providers

**Key Components & Selectors**:
- **Root container**: `data-testid="ranking-blend-builder"`
  - Mantine `Paper` component with borders and padding
  - Title: "Custom Ranking Blend" (uppercase, small font)
  
- **Ranking fields** (7 total):
  - `rank_us_news_national` → "US News National"
  - `rank_us_news_liberal_arts` → "US News Liberal Arts"
  - `rank_forbes` → "Forbes"
  - `rank_washington_monthly_national` → "Wash. Monthly National"
  - `rank_washington_monthly_liberal_arts` → "Wash. Monthly L.A."
  - `rank_niche` → "Niche"
  - `score_money` → "Money Score"

- **Field structure** (per ranking):
  - `data-field={field}` attribute on Box container
  - Label text (e.g., "US News National")
  - Weight display showing value and percentage (e.g., "45 (30%)")
  - **Slider**: Mantine `Slider` with min=0, max=100, step=5
  - `aria-label="{label} weight"` on each slider

- **Reset button**: Only visible when `totalWeight > 0`
  - Button with text "Reset" (variant="subtle", size="xs")

**State Management**: `weights: Record<string, number>` passed as prop, onChange callback

**URL Integration**: Blend weights serialized to `?blend=` query param

---

### 2. **Export Functionality**

**Location**: `/web/src/pages/Search.tsx` (lines 761-778)

**Two export formats**:

#### **CSV Export**
- **Button selector**: `button:has-text("Export CSV")` or `button[leftSection] + "Download"` (lucide icon)
- **Testid**: No explicit testid on export buttons, but button text is reliable
- **Handler**: `handleExportCsv()` → builds params and opens `/api/export/csv?filters=...&sort=...&userLat=...&userLng=...`
- **Icon**: `Download` (lucide-react, size 14px)
- **Disabled**: When `institutions.length === 0`

#### **PDF Export**
- **Button selector**: `button:has-text("Export PDF")` or `button[leftSection] + "FileDown"` (lucide icon)
- **Handler**: `handleExportPdf()` → calls `downloadSearchPdf()` helper function
- **Icon**: `FileDown` (lucide-react, size 14px)
- **Disabled**: When `institutions.length === 0`

**Export Parameters Passed**:
- Current filters (as FilterInput[] JSON)
- Current sort field (if active)
- User location (userLat, userLng, optionally userState)
- Output fields configuration
- Active filter labels

**Location in UI**: Top-right of results section, horizontally grouped with View Toggle and Columns buttons

---

### 3. **Geographic/Location Features**

**Component**: `/web/src/components/search/LocationInput.tsx`

**Purpose**: ZIP code input + browser geolocation for distance-based search

**Key Selectors**:

#### **Input Form** (when no location set):
- **ZIP input**: `<TextInput label="ZIP code" placeholder="e.g. 02134" />`
  - Accepts 5-digit format
  - Error text shown if invalid (red text)
  - Mantine TextInput, size="xs"
  
- **Go button**: `<Button size="xs">Go</Button>`
  - Disabled while fetching: `disabled={zipResult.fetching}`
  - Validates 5-digit format on click
  
- **Use my location button**: `<Button variant="light" size="xs">Use my location</Button>`
  - Icon: `<MapPin size={14} />` (or `<Loader2 size={14} />` while loading)
  - Disabled while fetching: `disabled={geoLoading}`
  - Uses browser's `navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition()`

#### **Selected Location Display** (when location set):
- Displays as: `MapPin icon → Location text → Clear button`
- **Location text**: Either `displayName` (e.g., "Boston, MA") or lat/long decimal format (e.g., "42.33°, -71.11°")
- **Clear button**: `<Button variant="subtle" size="compact-xs">`
  - Icon: `<X size={12} />`
  - `aria-label="Clear location"`
  - Clears location from filter state

**GraphQL Query**: `ResolveZip($zip: String!)` query returns `{ zip, latitude, longitude, state, city }`

**Distance Display in Results**:
- **In Institution Cards**: Shows `distance` field if `hasLocation === true`
  - Format: `"45 mi"` or `"< 1 mi"` or `"—"` (if null)
  - Testid: `data-testid="distance"` (in InstitutionCard and ResultsList)
  
- **In Results Table**: Distance column (sortable)
  - Testid: `data-testid="distance"` on each cell
  - Sortable via `data-testid="sort-distance"` header button

**State Variables in Search.tsx**:
- `userLocation: { latitude: number; longitude: number; state?: string }`
- Persisted in URL as: `?userLat=...&userLng=...&userState=...`

---

### 4. **Table Column Customization (Column Picker)**

**Component**: `/web/src/components/search/ColumnPicker.tsx`

**Location**: Top-right of results section (only visible in table view)

**Trigger Button**:
- Button text: "Columns"
- Icon: `<Columns size={16} />` (lucide-react)
- Selector: `button:has-text("Columns")`
- Variant: "default"

**Popover Dropdown** (opens on button click):
- Width: 300px
- Position: "bottom-end"
- Scrollable: max-height 500px

**Structure**:
1. **Visibility toggles** — grouped by theme (CORE, LOCATION, ACADEMICS, etc.)
   - Each theme has a heading
   - Checkboxes for each field in theme
   - "name" column is always checked and disabled (pinned)
   - Selector: `input[type="checkbox"]` + `label` text

2. **Column order section** (divider, then "Column Order" heading)
   - Only visible if at least one non-pinned column is visible
   - **Draggable items** with:
     - Testid: `data-testid="column-order-item-{fieldName}"`
     - Drag handle icon: `<GripVertical size={14} />`
     - Field name/label text
     - Up/Down arrow buttons (disabled at start/end)
     - Up arrow: `aria-label="Move {label} up"`
     - Down arrow: `aria-label="Move {label} down"`

**State Management**:
- `visibleColumns: Set<string>` — which columns are shown
- `columnOrder: string[]` — order of non-pinned columns
- Persisted to localStorage: `kapow:visible-columns` and `kapow:column-order`

**Results Table Integration**:
- Theme-grouped header rows appear dynamically based on visible fields
- Testid on theme headers: `data-testid="theme-group-{THEME_NAME}"`
  - Example: `data-testid="theme-group-COST"` for cost fields grouped header

---

### 5. **Navigation Header**

**Component**: `/web/src/components/layout/Header.tsx`

**Layout**: Sticky header, full width, dark blue background (`var(--color-primary)`)

**Desktop Structure** (visible from `md` breakpoint and above):
- **Logo/Wordmark** (clickable link to home):
  - `<Link to="/" />`
  - Icon: `<GraduationCap size={28} />` (accent gold color)
  - Text: "College Power Search" (white, semi-bold)
  - Font size: lg
  
- **Desktop Nav Links** (visibleFrom="md"):
  - Home: `<NavLink to="/" />`
  - About: `<NavLink to="/about" />`
  - Active link styling: accent gold color
  - Inactive styling: white with 80% opacity

- **Desktop Auth Actions** (visibleFrom="md"):
  - If loading: nothing rendered
  - If user logged in: `<UserMenu />`
  - If user not logged in: `<SignInMenu />`

**Mobile Structure** (hiddenFrom="md"):
- **Burger menu**: `<Burger opened={drawerOpened} onClick={toggleDrawer} aria-label="Toggle navigation" />`
  - Color: white
  - Selector for mobile: `button[aria-label="Toggle navigation"]`
  
- **Mobile Drawer** (Mantine Drawer component):
  - Title: "Navigation"
  - Size: "xs"
  - Contains:
    - Home and About NavLinks (stacked)
    - Auth component (SignInMenu or UserMenu)
  - Close on link click
  - Selector: `[role="dialog"]` for the drawer itself

---

### 6. **Authentication UI**

**Sign In Component**: `/web/src/components/auth/SignInMenu.tsx`

**Sign In Button**:
- Visible when user is not logged in
- Button text: "Sign In"
- Variant: "accent-outline" (gold/accent color outline)
- Size: "sm"
- Selector: `button:has-text("Sign In")`

**Sign In Menu Dropdown** (Mantine Menu):
- Opens on button click
- Single option: "Continue with Google"
- Clicking triggers: `supabase.auth.signInWithOAuth({ provider: 'google', ... })`
- Redirect to: `/auth/callback`

---

**User Menu Component**: `/web/src/components/auth/UserMenu.tsx`

**User Avatar Trigger**:
- Avatar with user initials or image
- `src={avatarUrl}` from Supabase user metadata
- Size: "sm", color: "accent"
- Cursor: pointer
- Selector: Avatar is in a Group with gap="xs"

**User Menu Dropdown**:
- **Header label**: 
  - Full name (from `user_metadata.full_name`)
  - Email (from `user.email`)
  - Both truncated if too long
  
- **Menu divider**
  
- **Sign out item**:
  - Text: "Sign out"
  - Color: red
  - Selector: `[role="menuitem"]:has-text("Sign out")`
  - Handler: `signOut()` from authStore

---

### 7. **Home Page Sample Searches**

**Component**: `/web/src/components/search/SampleSearchCarousel.tsx`

**Carousel Section**:
- Title: "Explore Sample Searches" (centered, heading level 2)
- Uses Mantine Carousel with:
  - Loop enabled
  - With controls (prev/next buttons)
  - Responsive slide sizes: 100% (mobile), 50% (tablet), 33% (desktop)
  - Slide gap: "lg"

**Sample Search Cards**:
- Testid: `data-testid="sample-search-card"`
- Component: `<Card component={Link} />`
- Contents:
  - Icon box (44×44px, brand blue background)
  - Title text (large, brand blue)
  - Description text (small, dimmed)
  - List of up to 4 sample institutions from that search:
    - Format: "Institution Name — City, State"
    - Or skeleton loading bars while fetching
  - Result count link (accent gold): "{total.toLocaleString()} results ›"
  
- **Click behavior**: Navigates to `/search?{filters}` URL

**Selector for first card**: `[data-testid="sample-search-card"]:first-of-type`

---

### 8. **Results View Modes**

**View Toggle Component**: `/web/src/components/search/ViewToggle.tsx`

**Control**:
- Mantine `SegmentedControl` with 4 options
- Size: "xs"
- Aria-label: "View mode"
- Selector: `[aria-label="View mode"]`

**View Modes**:
1. **Card** (default): `value="card"`
   - Icon: `<LayoutGrid size={16} />`
   - Input: `<input value="card" />`
   - Trigger: `input[value="card"] + label` or segmented control click
   
2. **List**: `value="list"`
   - Icon: `<List size={16} />`
   - Selector: `input[value="list"] + label`
   
3. **Table**: `value="table"`
   - Icon: `<Table2 size={16} />`
   - Selector: `input[value="table"] + label`
   - Shows column picker button when active
   
4. **Map**: `value="map"`
   - Icon: `<Map size={16} />`
   - Selector: `input[value="map"] + label`

**State Persistence**:
- Saved to localStorage: `kapow:results-view`
- Also persisted to URL as `?view=` param

---

### 9. **Results List & Cards**

**Institution Card** (`InstitutionCard.tsx`):
- Clickable card with hover state
- Contains:
  - Institution name (brand blue, semi-bold)
  - City, state
  - **Distance** (if `hasLocation`): `data-testid="distance"` shows formatted distance
  - **My Price** (if `hasState`): `data-testid="my-price"` shows formatted price
  - Additional metadata fields

**Loading Skeleton** (`InstitutionCardSkeleton`):
- Testid: `data-testid="result-skeleton"`
- Shown while results are loading

**Results Loading Container**:
- Testid: `data-testid="results-loading"`
- Contains multiple skeletons while fetching

---

### 10. **Results Table Specifics**

**Table Structure** (`ResultsTable.tsx`):
- Mantine `Table` component with `striped` and `highlightOnHover`
- **Two header rows** (when extra fields visible):
  1. Theme group spanning headers (COST, ACADEMICS, OUTCOMES, etc.)
     - Testid: `data-testid="theme-group-{THEME}"`
  2. Column headers with sort controls

**Header Cells**:
- Sortable headers: `<UnstyledButton>` with `data-testid="sort-{fieldName}"`
  - Example: `data-testid="sort-name"`, `data-testid="sort-distance"`, `data-testid="sort-city"`
  - Click to toggle ASC → DESC → clear
  - Sort icon: `<ArrowUp size={14} />` (ASC) or `<ArrowDown size={14} />` (DESC) or `<ArrowUpDown size={14} opacity="0.3" />` (inactive)

**Data Cells**:
- Name column: sticky left, brand blue, semi-bold
- Distance: `data-testid="distance"` (format: "45 mi", "< 1 mi", "—")
- My Price: `data-testid="my-price"` (format: "$45,000")
- Blend Score: `data-testid="blend-score"` (format: "75.3" representing percentage)

**Table Rows**:
- Clickable: `onClick={() => onClickInstitution(unitID)}`
- Cursor: pointer
- Hover: highlight color

---

### 11. **Detail Modal**

**Component**: `/web/src/components/search/InstitutionDetail.tsx`

**Modal Trigger**: Click on any institution card/row

**Modal Properties**:
- Mantine `Modal` component
- `opened={detailOpened}`
- `onClose={() => setDetailOpened(false)}`
- Full-width on mobile, responsive on desktop

**Content Structure**:
- Institution name, city, state heading
- Detail rows with labels and values:
  - Type (Public/Private nonprofit/Private for-profit)
  - Enrollment
  - Graduation rate
  - Admission rate
  - In-state tuition
  - Out-of-state tuition
  - Average net price
  - Retention rate
  - Student-faculty ratio
  
- Divider
- Optional "Similar Institutions" section (expandable)

---

### 12. **Pagination Controls**

**Location**: Bottom of results section (only if `totalPages > 1`)

**Testid**: `data-testid="pagination-controls"`

**Components**:
- **Pagination**: Mantine `Pagination` component
  - Total pages
  - Current page number buttons
  - Click to go to page N
  - Selector: `button:has-text("{pageNumber}")`
  
- **Page size selector**: `<NativeSelect>`
  - ID: "page-size"
  - Aria-label: "Per page"
  - Options: 5, 10, 20, 50, 100
  - Default: 20
  - Selector: `select#page-size` or `[aria-label="Per page"]`

---

## Summary Table: Key Selectors by Feature

| Feature | Primary Selector | Testid | Notes |
|---------|-----------------|--------|-------|
| Ranking blend builder | Paper container | `ranking-blend-builder` | Sliders per field, reset button |
| Export CSV | Button text "Export CSV" | None (use text) | Downloads to `/api/export/csv?...` |
| Export PDF | Button text "Export PDF" | None (use text) | Opens download dialog |
| Location input ZIP | `input[label="ZIP code"]` | None (use label) | 5-digit validation |
| Geolocation button | Button "Use my location" | None (use text) | Browser geolocation |
| Location display | MapPin icon + text | None | Editable via LocationInput |
| Column picker | Button "Columns" | None (use text) | Popover with checkboxes & drag |
| Column order item | — | `column-order-item-{fieldName}` | Draggable with up/down arrows |
| Header logo | Link to "/" | None | GraduationCap icon + "College Power Search" |
| Header nav Home | NavLink to "/" | None (use text) | Active styling when on home |
| Header nav About | NavLink to "/about" | None (use text) | Active styling when on /about |
| Mobile burger | Button | `aria-label="Toggle navigation"` | Toggles mobile drawer |
| Mobile drawer | Dialog | `role="dialog"` | Contains nav links + auth |
| Sign in button | Button "Sign In" | None (use text) | Opens Google OAuth flow |
| User avatar | Avatar | None | Shows initials or image |
| User menu sign out | Menu item "Sign out" | None (use text) | Red text, triggers logout |
| Sample search card | Card | `sample-search-card` | Carousel items, clickable links |
| View toggle | SegmentedControl | `aria-label="View mode"` | 4 icons: card, list, table, map |
| View selector | Input radio | `value="card/list/table/map"` | Click label to switch |
| Institution card distance | Distance text | `distance` | Only if `hasLocation` |
| Institution card price | Price text | `my-price` | Only if `hasState` |
| Card loading skeleton | Skeleton | `result-skeleton` | Multiple while loading |
| Results loading area | Container | `results-loading` | Contains skeletons |
| Sort header | Button/link | `sort-{fieldName}` | Toggles ASC/DESC/clear |
| Table distance cell | Table cell | `distance` | Per-row distance value |
| Table price cell | Table cell | `my-price` | Per-row price value |
| Blend score cell | Table cell | `blend-score` | When ranking blend active |
| Theme group header | Table header | `theme-group-{THEME}` | Spanning headers (COST, ACADEMIC, etc.) |
| Pagination | Controls | `pagination-controls` | Page buttons + per-page select |
| Per page select | NativeSelect | `id="page-size"` | Options: 5, 10, 20, 50, 100 |

---

This covers the main UI areas relevant to E2E tests for ranking blend, export, geographic search, table customization, navigation, and auth.
